---
title: "My Journey"
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
body-classes: "titre-page"
---

::: section-heading-edu
## Education
:::

::: timeline
::: timeline-item
::: timeline-date
2025 – 2026
:::
::: timeline-content
### Erasmus Exchange
**Dublin City University** · Dublin, Ireland

As part of my programme, I completed an Erasmus exchange at DCU. This experience strengthened my ability to work in an international environment and is the context in which this portfolio was created.
:::
:::

::: timeline-item
::: timeline-date
2024 – present
:::
::: timeline-content
### Programme Grande École - Information Systems Management
**IMT Business School**

I joined IMT Business School to develop a business and digital perspective, specialising in project management, business analysis, and digital transformation in organisations.
:::
:::

::: timeline-item
::: timeline-date
2020 – 2024
:::
::: timeline-content
### Bachelor's Degree in Biology
Before moving into business school, I completed a degree in biology. This background gave me a strong analytical foundation and a natural affinity for the healthcare sector.
:::
:::
:::

::: section-heading-exp
## Experience
:::

::: exp-card
::: exp-header
### Assistant Project Manager - Business Transformation
**GE HealthCare** · Buc, France · April – September 2026
:::
::: exp-body
Contributed to the migration of business processes towards the Transformation Hub within an international HealthTech environment.

- Gathered requirements, tracked tasks and KPIs across transformation projects
- Mapped business processes and identified automation opportunities (RPA, AI, API)
- Benchmarked solutions and formulated operational recommendations
- Standardised administrative processes (contracts, compliance, validation) and optimised workflows via Power Automate and SharePoint
:::
::: exp-tags
`Project Management` `Process Mapping` `Power Automate` `SharePoint` `HealthTech`
:::
:::

::: exp-card
::: exp-header
### Procurement & Supply Chain Project Intern
**BioSerenity** · Rosières-Pres-Troyes, France . May – September 2025
:::
::: exp-body
BioSerenity develops connected medical devices for neurological monitoring. Led a strategic procurement project for a critical PCB component across multiple teams.

- Managed a Plan A → Plan B pivot following component obsolescence and medical regulatory constraints
- Coordinated cross-functionally between production, procurement, and supplier teams to secure critical components
- Conducted BOM analysis, technology watch, and supplier negotiations (FR/EN)
- Tools: SAP Business ByDesign, advanced Excel (pivot tables, XLOOKUP)
:::
::: exp-tags
`SAP Business ByDesign` `Procurement` `Cross-team coordination` `Medical devices` `Risk management`
:::
:::
